compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement preconditions-validator.sh (depth-agnostic schema check + self-verification roundtrip)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## TDD Requirement
Implement preconditions-validator.sh to make all T1 tests pass GREEN.

## Implementation Notes
Create plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-validator.sh with:
- Shebang: #!/usr/bin/env bash
- Usage: preconditions-validator.sh <ticket_id> <stage> [--event-file=<path>]
  - When --event-file is provided, validate that file directly (used by tests with fixtures)
  - Without --event-file, calls _read_latest_preconditions(ticket_id, stage) from ticket-lib.sh to find the event
- Core validation logic (python3 inline):
  ```
  python3 - "$event_file" <<'PYEOF'
  import sys, json
  event = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
  required = ["event_type", "gate_name", "session_id", "worktree_id", "tier", "timestamp", "data"]
  missing = [f for f in required if f not in event]
  if missing:
      print(f"PRECONDITIONS_VALIDATION_ERROR: missing required fields: {missing}", file=sys.stderr)
      sys.exit(1)
  if event.get("event_type") != "PRECONDITIONS":
      print(f"PRECONDITIONS_VALIDATION_ERROR: event_type must be PRECONDITIONS, got {event.get('event_type')}", file=sys.stderr)
      sys.exit(1)
  # Unknown fields are IGNORED (depth-agnostic contract) — no rejection on extras
  sys.exit(0)
  PYEOF
  ```
- Self-verification mode (--self-verify=<event_file>):
  Validates the just-written event and also checks upstream_event_id field is present
  (used by preplanning SKILL.md exit handler for roundtrip + chain verification)
- Exit codes: 0=valid, 1=invalid (schema error), 2=event not found (no PRECONDITIONS event for stage)
- File must use _PLUGIN_ROOT pattern for any internal path references (no hardcoded plugins/dso/ paths)
- chmod +x must be applied

## File Impact
- CREATE: plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-validator.sh

## Pattern Reference
# from plugins/dso/scripts/suggestion-record.sh (existing append-only event writer pattern):
# _PLUGIN_ROOT is resolved via BASH_SOURCE[0]/readlink
# python3 used for JSON parsing (inline here-doc)
# Exit 0/1 interface for boolean pass/fail
#
# from plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-record.sh (Story 1, to be created):
# _write_preconditions(ticket_id, gate_name, session_id, worktree_id, tier, data_json)
# _read_latest_preconditions sourced from ticket-lib.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-validator.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-validator.sh
- [ ] All 3 behavioral tests in tests/scripts/test-preconditions-validator.sh pass GREEN
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-preconditions-validator.sh
- [ ] Validator accepts well-formed minimal event (exit 0) for known minimal-tier fields
  Verify: echo '{"event_type":"PRECONDITIONS","gate_name":"brainstorm_complete","session_id":"s1","worktree_id":"w1","tier":"minimal","timestamp":"2026-01-01T00:00:00Z","data":{}}' > /tmp/v-fixture.json && bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-validator.sh test-ticket brainstorm --event-file=/tmp/v-fixture.json; echo "exit:$?"
- [ ] Validator rejects event missing gate_name (exit 1 + stderr diagnostic)
  Verify: echo '{"event_type":"PRECONDITIONS","session_id":"s1","worktree_id":"w1","tier":"minimal","timestamp":"2026-01-01T00:00:00Z","data":{}}' > /tmp/v-bad.json && bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-validator.sh test-ticket brainstorm --event-file=/tmp/v-bad.json 2>&1; test $? -eq 1
- [ ] Validator ignores unknown fields (exit 0 for event with extra fields like decisions_log, test_contract)
  Verify: echo '{"event_type":"PRECONDITIONS","gate_name":"x","session_id":"s1","worktree_id":"w1","tier":"minimal","timestamp":"2026-01-01T00:00:00Z","data":{},"decisions_log":[],"test_contract":{}}' > /tmp/v-extra.json && bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-validator.sh test-ticket brainstorm --event-file=/tmp/v-extra.json; echo "exit:$?"
- [ ] Script uses _PLUGIN_ROOT (not hardcoded plugins/dso/) for internal path references
  Verify: grep -v '#' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-validator.sh | grep -v '_PLUGIN_ROOT\|BASH_SOURCE\|readlink' | grep 'plugins/dso/' && echo "FAIL: hardcoded path found" || echo "OK"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately

comments.body:
AC amendment: Add exit-2 (not-found) behavioral test to acceptance criteria.

- [ ] Validator returns exit 2 when no event file is found for the given ticket+stage (without --event-file flag, when no live PRECONDITIONS event exists)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-validator.sh nonexistent-ticket brainstorm 2>&1; test $? -eq 2

Rationale: T2's ACs cover exit 0 (valid) and exit 1 (invalid) but not exit 2 (not-found). The not-found case is what triggers preplanning's entry gate block when brainstorm hasn't run yet. Without this AC, the exit-2 path could be incorrectly implemented as exit 1, causing misleading diagnostics.
comments.author: Test
